title: Delicate Creamy Spanish Pumpkin Paella
description: A floral and creamy Spanish dish featuring pumpkin, cooked to perfection in a papillote on a wooden board, perfect for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the diced pumpkin, olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Spread the pumpkin mixture on a wooden board lined with parchment paper, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Arborio rice, saffron threads, and heavy cream.
Pour the rice mixture over the pumpkin, making sure to stay within the border.
Cover the wooden board with aluminum foil, creating a papillote, and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
While the paella is baking, heat a small skillet over medium heat and saute the diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Once the paella is done, top it with the sauteed onion and garlic mixture and serve immediately.
